description: Composition Blue sleeveless round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, flaring pintucks on the chest, half buttoned placket, two patch pockets at the midriff and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron The bright gypsy style patterning on fabrics, that's trending in fashion circuits, is already selling like hot cakes on myntra and you can join the trend with this biba kurta. Fashioned to please your colour fetish, this piece can be styled with colourful capris or conservative leggings. Model statistics The product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
